name: runbook-manager
description: Generate and update production runbooks per project

commands.name: create_runbook
commands.description: Generate a new runbook for a project

commands.name: update_runbook
commands.description: Update an existing runbook with current infra state

add_issue.description: Append issue with format: Symptom:.. Cause:.. Fix:..

add_contact.description: Add contact with format: Name:.. Role:.. Contact:..
